title: Fletching Expanded
description: A full archery revamp, adding a use for the fletching table, new arrow types, new ranged enchantments, and more!
body:
# Fletching Expanded

Improves Minecraft's fletching system by adding a gui to Fletching Tables with a unique crafting system for arrows! Fletching Expanded also adds many other features such as 8 new arrow types, ranged weaponry enchants, and a quiver that can store arrows!

![Fletching Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81c0a0e35f033ca773e57e0dcffdc52d23b5389b.png)

## Mod Overview
<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- **Arrow Shaft** - used to craft arrows
- **Quiver** - combat tool that can store and switch arrows
- **Iron Arrow** - slightly stronger than flint arrows
- **Flame Arrow** - sets mobs on fire
- **Frost Arrow** - freezes and slows down mobs
- **Amethyst Arrow** - shatters on impact, dealing aoe damage
- **Echo Arrow** - powerful and expensive arrow that launches enemies up on impact
- **Slime Arrow** - bouncy arrow
- **Phantom Arrow** - zero-gravity arrow
- **Homing Arrow** - homes in on nearby hostile mobs

</details>

<details>
<summary>The Fletching Table</summary>

Adds a custom GUI that can be used to craft arrows!

![Fletching Table GUI with shaft slot, tip slot, and output.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fffb07640e0a0ee97b5d7d0d208f4b48425a0bad_0.webp)

The Fletching GUI requires an Arrow Shaft or Arrow and an arrow tip to craft arrows. Some examples of recipes are:

- Arrow Shaft + Flint -> **Flint Arrow**
- Arrow Shaft + Iron Ingot -> **Iron Arrow**
- Arrow Shaft + Amethyst Shard -> **Amethyst Arrow**
- Flint Arrow + Fire Charge -> **Flame Arrow**

You can also craft Tipped Arrows using the GUI! The recipe uses Flint Arrows and any normal potion.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchantment Tweaks</summary>

- Reduces Power's max level to 3 for balance
- Removes Infinity and Flame
- Adds Streak enchantment for bows that increases speed and damage based on consecutive hits
- Adds Explosive enchantment for crossbows that causes arrows to explode on impact

</details>

## 

Special thanks to **Hollowed** and **Zarkanaseen** for helping with the art+code! :D

### Enjoy!
